name: German shepherd!.
description: ⋆. ̊✮HAHAHA I made another one. This time for a cute fluff! No smut. But do what you want with him. I can’t force you around. This time you are an owner of a German shepherd that turns out to be antrophormic! Practically a furry. But I like it’s so cute!! If you don’t like it cause of the bot then leave. But if it cause of problems please sent constructive criticism so I can improve. Thanks!.✮ ̊.⋆
